parse.title: Now That's What I Call Music! 50 (American series)
parse.wikitext:
{{Now-num|50th|U.S.|50}} {{Infobox album | name = Now That's What I Call Music! 50 | type = Compilation | artist = Various artists | cover = Now That's What I Call Music 50 (2014 US).jpeg | alt = | released = {{start date|2014|05|06}} | recorded = | venue = | studio = | genre = | length = 76:43 | label = [[Universal Music Enterprises]] | producer = | chronology = Numbered series | prev_title = [[Now That's What I Call Music! 49 (American series)|Now That's What I Call Music! 49]] | prev_year = 2014 | next_title = Now That's What I Call Music! 51 | next_year = 2014 }} '''''Now That's What I Call Music! 50''''' is the 50th edition of the ''[[Now That's What I Call Music!|Now!]]'' series in the United States, released on May 6, 2014.{{cite press release|title=NOW That's What I Call Music! 50th Deluxe Edition |url=http://www.universalmusicenterprises.com/nowthatswhaticallmusic/news/detail?id=462 |date=February 25, 2014 |access-date=April 10, 2014}} The album features 21 tracks including the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]] number-one hits, "[[Happy (Pharrell Williams song)|Happy]]", "[[Dark Horse (Katy Perry song)|Dark Horse]]" and "[[All of Me (John Legend song)|All of Me]]". A special deluxe edition includes 14 additional tracks from previously released volumes of the series as selected through an online voting process. The album sold 153,000 copies and debuted at number one on the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]] albums chart. The album is the 18th album in the series to reach the top of chart, and, as of 2025, the most recent in the American series to do so. [[The Beatles]] are the only artist to amass more number ones (19) than the ''Now'' series.{{cite web| title=Chart Watch: 'Now' Bumps 'Frozen'...Again | url=https://music.yahoo.com/blogs/chart-watch/chart-watch-now-bumps-frozen-again-212210096.html| first=Paul |last=Grein| access-date=May 16, 2014}} As of October 2014, the compilation has sold 642,000 copies.{{cite web |url=https://music.yahoo.com/blogs/chart-watch/chart-watch-extra-wanted-a-platinum-album-181237025.html|title=Wanted: A Platinum Album |last=Grein |first=Paul |work=Yahoo! Music |date=October 20, 2014 }} In 2019, the album reached number 135 on the Billboard 200's Decade-End chart.{{cite magazine|url=https://www.billboard.com/charts/decade-end/billboard-200|title=Decade-End Charts: Billboard 200|magazine=Billboard|access-date=December 18, 2019}} ==Track listing== {{Track listing |
